---
title: "FRESH Artifact Previews"
subtitle: "Interactive artifacts from the FRESH portfolio — share the link; it opens and runs in any browser (unlike an emailed file)."
description: |
  A shareable gallery of self-contained interactive artifacts (narrated data
  stories, explorers, animations) from across the FRESH portfolio. Each has a
  web embed and a mobile-optimized link. Unlisted — reachable by link only.
date: "2026-07-23"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
          <meta name="referrer" content="no-referrer">
# UNLISTED: keep this out of the site index + feed by adding
#   - "!artifacts/index.qmd"
# to the `listing.contents` block in ../index.qmd when you promote.
# (Do not add it to the navbar in _quarto.yml.)
resources:
  - ketones-repool.html
  - ketones-repool-mobile.html
---

::: {.fi-standfirst}
These are working interactive artifacts, shared by link for collaborators. Each
runs entirely in the browser — nothing to install, no server. **Tapping the link
on a phone works** (an emailed `.html` file does not, because mail apps block the
JavaScript that draws the artifact).
:::

## Ketones × cognition — the re-pool story, then an explorer

*Source: `fresh_evidence/reports/viewer/` · engine: MA re-pool (`R/repool.R`) +
`interactive-storytelling` · from the Bonnechère 2026 meta-analysis of 29 RCTs.*

It narrates how a published pooled effect (SMD **0.29**) holds up under scrutiny —
a mis-pooled variance the random-effects model absorbs, then risk-of-bias,
endpoint, and chronic-dosing filters — and lands in a live explorer where you
slice the 29 trials yourself and watch the pool re-form.

```{=html}
<iframe id="ketonesFrame" class="artifact-frame"
        src="ketones-repool.html" title="Ketones × cognition — re-pool story → explorer"
        style="width:100%;border:1px solid #eee8df;border-radius:12px;background:#fffdf8;height:620px"
        scrolling="yes" loading="lazy"></iframe>
<p style="margin:.5rem 0 0;font-size:.9rem">
  <a href="ketones-repool.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open web version full-screen ↗</a>
  &nbsp;·&nbsp;
  <a href="ketones-repool-mobile.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open mobile version ↗</a>
</p>
<script>
// Same-origin: size the iframe to its content so the whole artifact shows without a nested scrollbar.
(function(){
  var f=document.getElementById("ketonesFrame");
  function fit(){ try{ var d=f.contentDocument; if(d&&d.body){ f.style.height=(d.body.scrollHeight+8)+"px"; } }catch(e){} }
  f.addEventListener("load",function(){ fit(); setTimeout(fit,500); });
  window.addEventListener("resize",fit);
})();
</script>
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Web vs mobile.** The embed above and the *web* link show the full two-column
layout (chart + rail). The *mobile* link is a phone-first rendition — narration
capped to two lines, the meta-analysis and filters condensed to compact tap
targets, the forest cropped to fit. Share whichever matches how your collaborator
will open it; both are the same underlying artifact.
:::

<!-- Add the next artifact as another `## …` section + iframe + links, and list
     its resource file in the frontmatter `resources:` block above. -->
